name: PokeApi.Tasks
comment:
A collection of tasks that represent endpoints to the PokeAPI


# Models

@docs ParameterType, Page, nameOf, idOf, urlOf, onPage, onPageOfSize


# List-based HTTP tasks

Gets a list of the specified resource

@docs getResourceList, getResourceListByUrl

    -- gets a list of pokemon
    getResourceList Pokemon_ (onPage 1)


# Single resource-based HTTP tasks

Retrieves a single resource of the specific resource for that function

    -- gets the pokemon with name "pikachu"
    getPokemonBy (nameOf "pikachu")

    -- gets the berry with id 5
    getBerryBy (idOf 5)

@docs getAbilityBy, getBerryBy, getBerryFirmnessBy, getBerryFlavorBy, getCharacteristicBy, getContestEffectBy, getContestTypeBy, getEggGroupBy, getEncounterConditionBy, getEncounterConditionValueBy, getEncounterMethodBy, getEvolutionChainBy, getEvolutionTriggerBy, getGenderBy, getGenerationBy, getGrowthRateBy, getItemBy, getItemAttributeBy, getItemCategoryBy, getItemFlingEffectBy, getItemPocketBy, getLanguageBy, getLocationBy, getLocationAreaBy, getMachineBy, getMoveBy, getMoveAilmentBy, getMoveBattleStyleBy, getMoveCategoryBy, getMoveDamageClassBy, getMoveLearnMethodBy, getMoveTargetBy, getNatureBy, getPalParkAreaBy, getPokeathlonStatBy, getPokedexBy, getPokemonBy, getPokemonColorBy, getPokemonFormBy, getPokemonHabitatBy, getPokemonShapeBy, getPokemonSpeciesBy, getRegionBy, getStatBy, getSuperContestEffectBy, getTypeBy, getVersionBy, getVersionGroupBy, getBy

unions.name: Page
unions.comment: Specify what page and how big that page should be

unions.name: ParameterType
unions.comment: Represents the type of parameter used to search with

values.name: getBy
values.type: Resource -> Decoder a -> ParameterType -> Task Error a

values.name: getResourceList
values.comment:
Gets a list of the specified resource

Example

    -- get a list of pokemon
    getResourceList Pokemon_ (OnPage 1)

values.name: getResourceListByUrl
values.comment:
Provides a way to chain tasks

Example

    -- gets the next page of pokemon
    getResourceList Pokemon_ (OnPage 1)
        |> Task.andThen (getResourceListByUrl << .next)

values.name: onPageOfSize
values.comment:
Specifies page with a page limit

    -- page 2 with limit of 30 items per page
    onPageOfSize 2 30

name: PokeApi

unions.name: Resource
unions.comment:
Resource represents each endpoint available to you on the API

Note that each resource ends with an underscore because the design choice
was to keep the name of each related model free of the underscore

aliases.name: Ability
